nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 湿地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联56种鸟类，包括鵲鵝、澳洲硬尾鸭、黑天鹅等56种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Spotted towhee
nodes.summary: Spotted towhee（Spotted towhee，学名 Pipilo maculatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括湿地、灌丛。

nodes.name: 加利福尼亚州
nodes.summary: 加利福尼亚州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括黑嘴天鹅、帝雁、桂紅鴨等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 新墨西哥州
nodes.summary: 新墨西哥州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括Gambel's quail、小艾草松鸡、Mountain plover等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 亞利桑那州
nodes.summary: 亞利桑那州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括桂紅鴨、Gambel's quail、小艾草松鸡等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 索诺拉沙漠
nodes.summary: 索诺拉沙漠是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Arizona woodpecker、Cassin's vireo、Rufous-winged sparrow等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 北美大平原
nodes.summary: 北美大平原是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Lincoln's sparrow、Spotted towhee，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Coastal sage scrub
nodes.summary: Coastal sage scrub是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Spotted towhee，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds across north-western North America and is present year-round in California, Nevada, Arizona, Utah, Oregon, Washington, Idaho and southern British Columbia. It is not found in arid climates and as a result does not reside in the Sonoran Desert, but resides in northern Arizona and the entirety of California except the southeast corner that borders Arizona

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in fringe wetland forests and riparian forests near the border of upland forests. Because the spotted towhee's habitat overlaps with areas of the United States that experience regular forest fires (Arizona, New Mexico, California), it tends to be found in unburned chaparral and avoids chaparral and forests which have been burned due to lack of ground cover and minimal foraging ability

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in fringe wetland forests and riparian forests near the border of upland forests. Because the spotted towhee's habitat overlaps with areas of the United States that experience regular forest fires (Arizona, New Mexico, California), it tends to be found in unburned chaparral and avoids chaparral and forests which have been burned due to lack of ground cover and minimal foraging ability

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Spotted towhees will be present in an area that is recovering after a burn (less than 15 years old), due to excellent ground cover and ease of ground foraging from the recovering understory vegetation, although populations will decrease after a forest fire until the vegetation has grown back. thumb|Spotted towhee at Vasona Park Its breeding habitat in the southwest is largely dependent on coastal sage scrub, as it provides cover from predators. It migrates to northern and northwestern United States and southwestern Canada to breed in scrubland, parks and suburban gardens. Northwestern birds migrate eastwards to the central plains of the United States, mostly the northwestern-central Great Plains

It migrates to northern and northwestern United States and southwestern Canada to breed in scrubland, parks and suburban gardens. Northwestern birds migrate eastwards to the central plains of the United States, mostly the northwestern-central Great Plains
